promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next concrete residual paired-family refinement immediately after the mutual-information baseline A2-mid batch deferred the larger negativity-stress search family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest family-level seams: stress-pair identity, full-grid exhaustion with zero best score, best-plus-sample compression, local evidence without repo-top admission, smaller-baseline-over-larger-search inversion, and the anti-overread against tiny branch deltas.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The mutual-information A2-mid batch provides the adjacent baseline comparison packet, the AB A2-mid batch provides a nearby metric-without-negativity caution pattern, and the sims evidence-boundary batch provides the local evidence versus repo-top omission pattern.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because it is the next residual pair and must stay outside this bounded stress-failure pass.
Not selected because it would erase the smaller-baseline-versus-larger-search-family boundary preserved by the parent batch.
Not selected because the parent family batch already contains the needed bounded seams.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent stress-family batch plus nearby A2-mid sims anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable shell, exhaustion, retention, evidence-status, inversion, and micro-delta caution packets without reopening raw sims files.

candidate_items.name: AXIS0_NEGSAGB_STRESS_PAIR_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest shell for the axis0 negativity-stress residual pair.

candidate_items.name: FULL_GRID_ZERO_SCORE_EXHAUSTION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest failed-search packet.

candidate_items.name: BEST_PLUS_SAMPLE_RETENTION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's strongest storage-granularity seam.

candidate_items.name: LOCAL_STRESS_EVIDENCE_WITHOUT_REPOTOP_ADMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's main visibility contradiction for the stress family.

candidate_items.name: BASELINE_OUTPERFORMS_STRESS_ON_NEGATIVITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest anti-supersession packet between the larger stress sweep and the smaller baseline.

candidate_items.name: MICRO_DELTAS_DO_NOT_REDEEM_ZERO_SCORE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest anti-overread packet between tiny branch motion and failed negativity.

quarantined_items.name: SEARCH_BREADTH_AS_SEARCH_SUCCESS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The runner spans a large grid, but the stored best score remains zero after full exhaustion.

quarantined_items.name: BEST_PLUS_SAMPLE_AS_FULL_SEARCH_TRACE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The stored output preserves only the best record and a small sample, not the full search table.

quarantined_items.name: LOCAL_EVIDENCE_AS_REPOTOP_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Catalog presence and local evidence are both weaker than repo-top evidence admission.

quarantined_items.name: LARGER_STRESS_SWEEP_AS_AUTOMATIC_BASELINE_SUPERSESSOR
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The larger stress sweep stores zero best negativity and therefore does not automatically supersede the smaller baseline's tiny nonzero negativity tail.

quarantined_items.name: MICRO_BRANCH_DELTAS_AS_COMPENSATION_FOR_ZERO_NEGATIVITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The tiny branch deltas are weaker than the search objective they failed to satisfy.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest reusable family-level packets from the stress-search batch without reopening raw sims files.
They keep family identity, exhaustive failure, compressed retention, local-only evidence status, baseline inversion, and micro-delta caution distinct instead of collapsing them into one story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later residual family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain success-overreads, storage-overreads, admission-overreads, supersession-overreads, or metric-redemption overreads rather than reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated entirely from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used nearby A2-mid sims batches only as comparison anchors.
No raw source reread, runtime execution, or A2-1 mutation was performed.
